open-pdf-get-page-count.title: Open PDF and Get Page Count
open-pdf-get-page-count.description: Shows how to load a PDF file from disk with Aspose.Pdf.Document and retrieve the total number of pages in the document.

open-pdf-from-filestream-and-save.title: Open PDF from FileStream and Save to New File
open-pdf-from-filestream-and-save.description: Shows how to open a PDF document using a FileStream and then save it to another file with default settings using Aspose.Pdf.

open-pdf-without-password.title: Open PDF Without Password and Handle InvalidPasswordException
open-pdf-without-password.description: Demonstrates attempting to open a password‑protected PDF with Aspose.Pdf without supplying a password, catching InvalidPasswordException, and handling other errors.

save-pdf-to-memorystream-and-write-to-fi.title: Save PDF to MemoryStream and Write to File
save-pdf-to-memorystream-and-write-to-fi.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, saving it into a MemoryStream, and then writing the stream contents to a physical file.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa1b-preserve-metadata.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b while Preserving Metadata
convert-pdf-to-pdfa1b-preserve-metadata.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF, converting it to PDF/A‑1b compliance using Aspose.Pdf, and saving the result while automatically preserving the document's metadata.

export-pdf-as-pdfx3.title: Export PDF as PDF/X-3 with Color Profiles
export-pdf-as-pdfx3.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/X-3 compliance while preserving embedded color profiles, and save the resulting document.

encrypt-pdf-with-passwords-and-restrict-.title: Encrypt PDF with Passwords and Restrict Printing
encrypt-pdf-with-passwords-and-restrict-.description: Shows how to load a PDF, apply user and owner passwords, set permissions to allow only content extraction (disabling printing), and save the encrypted file using Aspose.Pdf.

decrypt-pdf-with-user-password.title: Decrypt Encrypted PDF with User Password
decrypt-pdf-with-user-password.description: Shows how to open a password‑protected PDF using Aspose.Pdf, decrypt it, and save an unprotected version.

add-blank-page-to-pdf-document.title: Add Blank Page to PDF Document
add-blank-page-to-pdf-document.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF with Aspose.Pdf, insert a new blank page, and save the modified document.

insert-pdf-page-into-another-pdf.title: Insert a PDF Page into Another PDF at a Specific Position
insert-pdf-page-into-another-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading two PDFs with Aspose.Pdf, extracting a page from the source document, inserting it into the target document at a given 1‑based position, and saving the result.

remove-third-page-from-pdf.title: Remove Third Page from PDF
remove-third-page-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, delete the third page, and save the resulting document.

split-pdf-into-single-page-files.title: Split PDF into Single-Page Files
split-pdf-into-single-page-files.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and save each page as an individual PDF document.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-pdfa-1b.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A‑1b
batch-convert-pdfs-to-pdfa-1b.description: Demonstrates how to process all PDF files in a folder, convert each to PDF/A‑1b format using Aspose.Pdf, and save the converted files to an output directory.

encrypt-pdf-from-stream.title: Encrypt PDF from Stream and Write to Output Stream
encrypt-pdf-from-stream.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a network stream, applying AES‑256 encryption with specific permissions, and saving the secured PDF back to an output stream.

create-pdfx3-document-multiple-pages.title: Create PDF/X‑3 Document with Multiple Pages
create-pdfx3-document-multiple-pages.description: Demonstrates creating a new PDF, adding three blank pages, converting it to PDF/X‑3 compliance, and saving the result.

update-pdf-title-metadata.title: Update PDF Title Metadata from Byte Array
update-pdf-title-metadata.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a byte array, modifying its title metadata, and saving the updated document to disk using Aspose.Pdf.

load-pdf-disable-font-embedding.title: Load PDF with Disabled Font Embedding and Save
load-pdf-disable-font-embedding.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF using HtmlLoadOptions to disable font embedding and then saving the document with PdfSaveOptions.

incrementally-update-pdf-add-blank-page.title: Incrementally Update PDF by Adding a Blank Page
incrementally-update-pdf-add-blank-page.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF with read/write access and saving it in incremental update mode after appending a new blank page, preserving existing content.

compress-pdf-default-settings.title: Compress PDF with Default Optimization
compress-pdf-default-settings.description: Shows how to load a PDF, apply Aspose.Pdf's default resource optimization, save the compressed file, and compare the original and compressed sizes.

export-pdf-pages-to-separate-files.title: Export PDF Pages to Separate Files
export-pdf-pages-to-separate-files.description: Shows how to split a PDF into individual page PDFs by iterating over the source document's pages and saving each page as its own PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-version-1-4-from-memorystream.title: Set PDF Version to 1.4 from MemoryStream
set-pdf-version-1-4-from-memorystream.description: Loads a PDF into a MemoryStream, changes its version to 1.4 using Aspose.Pdf's Convert method, and saves the result to the file system.

encrypt-pdf-form-fill-permission.title: Encrypt PDF with Form Fill Permission Only
encrypt-pdf-form-fill-permission.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, allowing only form filling while disabling content extraction.

create-pdfa1b-with-text-paragraph.title: Create PDF/A‑1b Document with Text Paragraph
create-pdfa1b-with-text-paragraph.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding a wrapped text paragraph to a page, converting the document to PDF/A‑1b compliance, and saving the result.

rotate-second-page-pdf.title: Rotate Second Page of PDF
rotate-second-page-pdf.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotate the second page 90 degrees clockwise, and save the modified document.

update-pdf-author-metadata.title: Update PDF Author Metadata with Aspose.Pdf
update-pdf-author-metadata.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF file, modifying its Author metadata, and saving the changes back to the original location using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-encrypt-pdfs.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with a User Password
batch-encrypt-pdfs.description: Shows how to encrypt every PDF in a directory using Aspose.Pdf, applying the same user password and saving the encrypted files to a separate folder.

batch-decrypt-encrypted-pdfs.title: Batch Decrypt Encrypted PDFs with Owner Password
batch-decrypt-encrypted-pdfs.description: Shows how to open multiple password‑protected PDF files using a shared owner password, decrypt each document, and save unprotected copies.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b with Embedded Fonts Preservation
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, converting it to PDF/A-1b while preserving the original document structure and embedded fonts, and saving the result.

compress-pdf-high-compression.title: Compress PDF with High Compression Level
compress-pdf-high-compression.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, apply high‑level compression using Aspose.Pdf optimization options, and save the result while reporting the size reduction.

download-pdf-from-url-and-save-locally.title: Download PDF from URL and Save Locally
download-pdf-from-url-and-save-locally.description: Demonstrates how to download a PDF from a network URL using HttpClient, load it into an Aspose.Pdf Document, and save it to a local file.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-disable-printing.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Disable Printing
encrypt-pdf-aes256-disable-printing.description: Demonstrates applying AES‑256 encryption to a PDF, restricting printing permissions, and verifying the security settings using Aspose.Pdf.

update-pdf-version-incremental-save.title: Update PDF Version to 1.5 with Incremental Save
update-pdf-version-incremental-save.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, converting it to version 1.5, and saving it using an incremental update to preserve the original file structure.

change-pdf-passwords.title: Change PDF Passwords Using Aspose.Pdf
change-pdf-passwords.description: Shows how to open a password‑protected PDF with the owner password, change both the user and owner passwords, and save the PDF with the new credentials.

split-pdf-at-page-ten.title: Split PDF into Two Parts at Page Ten
split-pdf-at-page-ten.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into two separate documents at page 10 using Aspose.Pdf and save each part with descriptive filenames.

set-and-verify-pdf-document-title.title: Set and Verify PDF Document Title
set-and-verify-pdf-document-title.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, setting its document title, saving the file, and then re‑opening it to verify the title.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b__v2.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑1b with Font Embedding
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/A‑1b compliance (embedding missing fonts) using Aspose.Pdf's Convert method, and save the resulting file.

convert-pdf-to-pdfx3-cmyk.title: Convert PDF to PDF/X‑3 with CMYK Color Space
convert-pdf-to-pdfx3-cmyk.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, converting it to PDF/X‑3 compliance while forcing all colors to CMYK using an ICC profile, and saving the resulting file.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-pdfa1b-csv-report.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A-1b with CSV Report
batch-convert-pdfs-to-pdfa1b-csv-report.description: Shows how to convert multiple PDF files to PDF/A-1b using Aspose.Pdf, save the converted files, and record each conversion's success in a CSV report.

rotate-fifth-page-180-degrees.title: Rotate Fifth Page of PDF by 180 Degrees
rotate-fifth-page-180-degrees.description: Loads a PDF from a byte array, rotates page 5 by 180 degrees, and saves the modified document.

encrypt-pdf-user-password-restricted-per.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password and Restricted Permissions
encrypt-pdf-user-password-restricted-per.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF with a user password, set an owner password, and limit actions to printing only, preventing editing and copying.

encrypt-pdf-form-fill-permission__v2.title: Encrypt PDF with Form‑Fill Only Permission
encrypt-pdf-form-fill-permission__v2.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, applying AES‑256 encryption that restricts permissions to only form filling, and saving the encrypted document.

split-pdf-into-individual-pages.title: Split PDF into Individual Pages and Save to Separate Folders
split-pdf-into-individual-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract each page into its own Document, and save each page as a separate PDF inside a dedicated folder.

update-pdf-author-metadata__v2.title: Update PDF Author Metadata with Current User
update-pdf-author-metadata__v2.description: Loads a PDF, replaces its Author metadata with the current OS user name, and saves the updated document.

encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-verify-size.title: Encrypt PDF with 128‑bit RC4 and Verify Size Increase
encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-verify-size.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, applying 128‑bit RC4 encryption with user and owner passwords and specific permissions, saving the encrypted file, and confirming that the file size grows slightly after encryption.

batch-pdf-encryption-from-json-config.title: Batch PDF Encryption from JSON Config
batch-pdf-encryption-from-json-config.description: Demonstrates reading a JSON configuration of encryption tasks, loading each PDF with Aspose.Pdf, applying AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords and specific permissions, and saving the encrypted files while logging the results.

convert-pdf-to-pdfx3-preserve-icc.title: Convert PDF to PDF/X‑3 while Preserving ICC Profile
convert-pdf-to-pdfx3-preserve-icc.description: Demonstrates how to convert a regular PDF to PDF/X‑3 using Aspose.Pdf, keeping the original ICC color profile and logging conversion details.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-pdfa-1b-with-compr.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A‑1b with Compression and Reporting
batch-convert-pdfs-to-pdfa-1b-with-compr.description: Demonstrates how to convert multiple PDF files to PDF/A‑1b format with high compression using Aspose.Pdf and generate a CSV‑style summary report.

add-custom-xmp-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Custom XMP Metadata to PDF
add-custom-xmp-metadata-to-pdf.description: Loads an existing PDF, injects a custom XMP metadata block, and saves the document while preserving the new metadata.

encrypt-pdf-owner-password-only.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password Only
encrypt-pdf-owner-password-only.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by providing only an owner password, leaving the user password empty and removing all user permissions.

rotate-all-pdf-pages-180-degrees.title: Rotate All PDF Pages 180 Degrees
rotate-all-pdf-pages-180-degrees.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotate every page by 180 degrees, and save the modified document.

encrypt-pdf-aes128-verify-print-permissi.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑128 and Verify Print Permissions
encrypt-pdf-aes128-verify-print-permissi.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF using AES‑128, allowing high‑quality printing, and verifying the encryption by reopening the file with the user password.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b__v3.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1B Compliance
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b__v3.description: Loads a PDF file, converts it to PDF/A‑1B compliance using Aspose.Pdf, and saves the resulting document.

batch-encrypt-pdfs-with-derived-password.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Passwords Derived from File Names
batch-encrypt-pdfs-with-derived-password.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf, generating a deterministic password from each file name and logging the file‑name to password mappings.

batch-split-pdf-by-page-ranges.title: Batch Split PDF into Sections by Page Ranges
batch-split-pdf-by-page-ranges.description: Shows how to read page range definitions from a configuration file and split a PDF into separate documents using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-user-password-form-fill-only.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password and Form-Fill Only Permission
encrypt-pdf-user-password-form-fill-only.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using a user and owner password, allowing only form filling while disabling printing and other actions.

set-pdf-metadata.title: Set PDF Metadata (Author, Title, Subject)
set-pdf-metadata.description: The example opens an existing PDF, sets the Author, Title, and Subject properties using Aspose.Pdf, saves the file, and then reopens it to verify the metadata.

encrypt-pdf-rc4-verify-permissions.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4 and Verify Permissions
encrypt-pdf-rc4-verify-permissions.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using RC4‑128, disable copy permission, and programmatically verify the security settings by opening with the owner password and decrypting the document.
